prompt: I accidentally deleted my 'Renew the passport' to-do — get it back for me.
paraphrases: My passport-renewal task ended up in the trash by mistake. Restore it.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Renew the passport' AND trashed=0 AND status=0

pseudoScript: things todo restore "$(things trash --json | jq -r '.data[]|select(.title=="Renew the passport")|.uuid')"
